title: Add timetracking to My work
excerpt: Our technical members on any project will use My Work as their home base because it brings all tasks from many boards together.  However, they’re unable to use the Time Tracking feature without going into individual boar…

posts.author: hrix (Heather Rix)
posts.cookedHtml: Our technical members on any project will use My Work as their home base because it brings all tasks from many boards together. However, they’re unable to use the Time Tracking feature without going into individual boards. This defeats the purpose of having your work in one place if you can’t perform all the tasks for that item.

posts.author: solarr (Solar)
posts.cookedHtml: This is the same for us. Have added a vote for this feature.

posts.author: gweb73 (Guy Long)
posts.cookedHtml: Absolutely agree with this. It seems like an obvious feature that is missing. It would really help our team with managing time tracking if they could do it from the My Work screen.
